---
title: "Differentiation Progression Analysis"
subtitle: >
  Quantifying differentiation timing differences
  from bulk RNA-seq time course data
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    fig-width: 8
    fig-height: 6
    fig-dpi: 150
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Overview

PCA-based method for comparing differentiation
progression between conditions in bulk RNA-seq time
course data.

![](assets/overview.svg){width="100%"}

**Dataset.** Data from
[Martinez et al. (2024)](https://doi.org/10.3389/fncel.2024.1341141):
D21 (euploid control) and T21 (trisomy 21)
iPSC-derived neural progenitors at Days 6, 10,
and 17 (18 samples, 3 replicates per condition).

## Motivation

Standard differential expression analysis compares
conditions at individual timepoints independently.
This discards the temporal structure of
differentiation. A sample that is transcriptionally
"ahead" or "behind" in differentiation will appear
differentially expressed at every timepoint, but the
underlying cause is a timing shift, not a
condition-specific program.

This method reduces the full transcriptomic trajectory
to a single scalar **maturation score** per sample.
This enables:

- Direct quantification of differentiation timing
  differences between conditions
- Detection of whether an experimental condition
  accelerates or delays differentiation
- Comparison across experiments that share a common
  reference time course

## Workflow

![](assets/workflow-flowchart.svg){width="50%"
fig-align="center"}

## Mathematical Framework

### PCA

Given a centered expression matrix $\mathbf{X}_c$
(genes $\times$ samples):

$$
\mathbf{X}_c
= \mathbf{U}\boldsymbol{\Sigma}\mathbf{V}^\top
$$

Each sample's coordinates in PC space:

$$
\mathbf{z}_i
= \mathbf{V}^\top
  \!\left(\mathbf{x}_i - \bar{\mathbf{x}}\right)
$$

### Centroid Vector

The reference vector connects control centroids at
the earliest and latest timepoints:

$$
\vec{v}
= \bar{\mathbf{z}}_{t_{\text{late}}}
  - \bar{\mathbf{z}}_{t_{\text{early}}}
\qquad\text{where}\quad
\bar{\mathbf{z}}_t
= \frac{1}{n_t}\sum_{i \in t}\mathbf{z}_i
$$

### Maturation Score

$$
s_i
= \frac{
    \left(\mathbf{z}_i
      - \bar{\mathbf{z}}_{t_{\text{early}}}\right)
    \cdot \vec{v}
  }{
    \lVert\vec{v}\rVert^2
  }
$$

By construction, $s \approx 0$ at the early control
centroid and $s \approx 1$ at the late control centroid.

---

## Analysis

### Setup

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(plotly)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(viridis)

meta <- readRDS("dat/metadata/WC24_metadata_clean.rds")
raw_counts <- readRDS(
  "dat/counts/raw/WC24_filt_raw_counts.rds"
)
vst_counts <- readRDS(
  "dat/counts/vst/WC24_vst_counts.rds"
)

meta$timepoint <- factor(
  meta$timepoint, levels = c(6, 10, 17)
)

cat(
  "Samples:", nrow(meta), "\n",
  "Genes:", nrow(raw_counts), "\n",
  "Genotypes:", paste(
    levels(factor(meta$genotype)), collapse = ", "
  ), "\n",
  "Timepoints:", paste(
    levels(meta$timepoint), collapse = ", "
  )
)
```

### Feature Selection: Likelihood Ratio Test

DESeq2 LRT on D21 controls: full model includes
timepoint, reduced model is intercept-only.

```{r}
#| label: lrt
#| cache: true

ctrl_meta <- meta[meta$genotype == "D21", ]
ctrl_counts <- raw_counts[, ctrl_meta$sample_id]

dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = ctrl_counts,
  colData   = ctrl_meta,
  design    = ~ timepoint
)
dds <- DESeq(dds, test = "LRT", reduced = ~ 1)
res <- results(dds)
res <- res[order(res$padj), ]

sig_genes <- rownames(res)[
  !is.na(res$padj) & res$padj < 0.05
]
n_top <- min(1000, length(sig_genes))
top_genes <- head(rownames(res), n_top)

cat(
  "Significant genes (padj < 0.05):",
  length(sig_genes), "\n",
  "Genes used for PCA:", n_top
)
```

### Temporally Variable Gene Heatmap

Z-scored VST expression of all LRT-significant genes
in D21 samples. Rows split into $k = 3$ clusters.

```{r}
#| label: fig-heatmap
#| fig-cap: >
#|   Z-scored expression of temporally variable genes
#|   across D21 control timepoints (k=3 row clusters,
#|   viridis palette, winsorized at +/- 2)
#| fig-height: 6
#| fig-width: 4

hm_mat <- as.matrix(
  vst_counts[sig_genes, ctrl_meta$sample_id]
)
hm_z <- t(scale(t(hm_mat)))
hm_z[hm_z >  2] <-  2
hm_z[hm_z < -2] <- -2

col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  seq(-2, 2, length.out = 100),
  viridis(100)
)

ht <- Heatmap(
  hm_z,
  name                   = "Z-score",
  col                    = col_fun,
  cluster_columns        = FALSE,
  cluster_rows           = TRUE,
  clustering_method_rows = "ward.D2",
  row_km                 = 3,
  row_gap                = unit(2, "mm"),
  show_row_names         = FALSE,
  show_column_names      = FALSE,
  column_split           = factor(
    ctrl_meta[colnames(hm_z), "timepoint"],
    levels = c(6, 10, 17)
  ),
  column_title    = c("Day 6", "Day 10", "Day 17"),
  column_gap      = unit(3, "mm"),
  row_title       = paste0(length(sig_genes), " genes"),
  border          = FALSE,
  use_raster      = TRUE
)

draw(ht)
```

### Example Temporal Patterns

```{r}
#| label: fig-lineplot
#| fig-cap: >
#|   Three representative LRT genes illustrating
#|   distinct temporal behaviors: monotonic decline,
#|   transient peak, and monotonic increase
#| fig-height: 3.5
#| fig-width: 9

ctrl_vst <- vst_counts[sig_genes, ctrl_meta$sample_id]
tp_num <- as.numeric(
  as.character(ctrl_meta$timepoint)
)

mean_d6  <- rowMeans(ctrl_vst[, tp_num == 6])
mean_d10 <- rowMeans(ctrl_vst[, tp_num == 10])
mean_d17 <- rowMeans(ctrl_vst[, tp_num == 17])

peak_early <- names(which(
  mean_d6 > mean_d10 & mean_d10 > mean_d17
))
mono_inc <- names(which(
  mean_d6 < mean_d10 & mean_d10 < mean_d17
))
peak_mid <- names(which(
  mean_d10 > mean_d6 & mean_d10 > mean_d17
))

dyn_range <- apply(
  cbind(mean_d6, mean_d10, mean_d17), 1,
  function(x) max(x) - min(x)
)

gene_early <- peak_early[
  which.max(dyn_range[peak_early])
]
gene_inc <- mono_inc[
  which.max(dyn_range[mono_inc])
]
gene_mid <- peak_mid[
  which.max(dyn_range[peak_mid])
]

example_genes <- c(gene_early, gene_mid, gene_inc)
pattern_names <- c(
  "Declining from Day 6",
  "Peak at Day 10",
  "Monotonic Increase"
)

plot_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(
  seq_along(example_genes), function(i) {
    g <- example_genes[i]
    data.frame(
      gene      = g,
      pattern   = pattern_names[i],
      timepoint = tp_num,
      expr      = as.numeric(ctrl_vst[g, ]),
      sample    = ctrl_meta$sample_id
    )
  }
))

plot_df$label <- paste0(
  plot_df$pattern, "\n(", plot_df$gene, ")"
)
plot_df$label <- factor(
  plot_df$label, levels = unique(plot_df$label)
)

plot_means <- plot_df %>%
  group_by(label, timepoint) %>%
  summarize(
    m  = mean(expr),
    se = sd(expr) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    data = plot_df,
    aes(x = timepoint, y = expr),
    color = "#000000", size = 1.5, alpha = 1
  ) +
  geom_errorbar(
    data = plot_means,
    aes(x = timepoint, ymin = m - se,
        ymax = m + se),
    width = 0.8, color = "#1E40AF",
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = plot_means,
    aes(x = timepoint, y = m),
    color = "#1E40AF", linewidth = 1
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = plot_means,
    aes(x = timepoint, y = m),
    color = "#1E40AF", size = 2.25
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ label, nrow = 1,
             scales = "free_y") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(6, 10, 17),
    labels = c("Day 6", "Day 10", "Day 17")
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "VST Expression") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(
      size = 10, face = "bold"
    ),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```

### D21 Control PC Space

PCA on D21 controls using top 1000 LRT genes defines
the reference coordinate system.

```{r}
#| label: pca-compute

pca_input <- t(as.matrix(
  vst_counts[top_genes, ctrl_meta$sample_id]
))
pca_res <- prcomp(pca_input, scale. = TRUE,
                  center = TRUE)

var_pct <- round(
  summary(pca_res)$importance[2, 1:3] * 100, 1
)

# Project all samples
all_input <- t(as.matrix(
  vst_counts[top_genes, meta$sample_id]
))
all_proj <- predict(pca_res, all_input)

pca_df <- data.frame(
  PC1       = all_proj[, 1],
  PC2       = all_proj[, 2],
  PC3       = all_proj[, 3],
  sample    = meta$sample_id,
  genotype  = meta$genotype,
  timepoint = paste0("Day ", meta$timepoint)
)

# Centroids
tp_num_all <- as.numeric(
  as.character(meta$timepoint)
)
ctrl_d6  <- meta$genotype == "D21" & tp_num_all == 6
ctrl_d10 <- meta$genotype == "D21" & tp_num_all == 10
ctrl_d17 <- meta$genotype == "D21" & tp_num_all == 17

centroid_d6  <- colMeans(all_proj[ctrl_d6,  1:3])
centroid_d10 <- colMeans(all_proj[ctrl_d10, 1:3])
centroid_d17 <- colMeans(all_proj[ctrl_d17, 1:3])
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-d21-pca
#| fig-cap: >
#|   D21 control samples in PC space defined by top
#|   1000 LRT genes, colored by timepoint

ctrl_pca <- pca_df[pca_df$genotype == "D21", ]

tp_colors <- c(
  "Day 6"  = "#2563EB",
  "Day 10" = "#059669",
  "Day 17" = "#DC2626"
)

scene_axes <- list(
  xaxis = list(title = paste0(
    "PC1 (", var_pct[1], "%)"
  )),
  yaxis = list(title = paste0(
    "PC2 (", var_pct[2], "%)"
  )),
  zaxis = list(title = paste0(
    "PC3 (", var_pct[3], "%)"
  ))
)

plot_ly(
  ctrl_pca,
  x = ~PC1, y = ~PC2, z = ~PC3,
  color  = ~timepoint,
  colors = tp_colors,
  type   = "scatter3d",
  mode   = "markers",
  marker = list(size = 4.5, opacity = 1),
  text   = ~paste(sample, timepoint),
  hoverinfo = "text"
) %>%
  layout(scene = scene_axes)
```

### Choosing the Reference Vector

Three possible vectors connect pairs of D21 control
centroids. Each captures a different segment of the
differentiation trajectory.

```{r}
#| label: fig-vector-options
#| fig-cap: >
#|   Three candidate reference vectors on D21
#|   controls: Day 6 to Day 10 (early),
#|   Day 10 to Day 17 (late),
#|   Day 6 to Day 17 (full trajectory, used here)

plot_ly() %>%
  # D21 samples
  add_trace(
    data = ctrl_pca,
    x = ~PC1, y = ~PC2, z = ~PC3,
    color  = ~timepoint,
    colors = tp_colors,
    type   = "scatter3d", mode = "markers",
    marker = list(size = 4.5, opacity = 1),
    text   = ~paste(sample, timepoint),
    hoverinfo = "text"
  ) %>%
  # Centroids
  add_trace(
    x = c(centroid_d6[1], centroid_d10[1],
          centroid_d17[1]),
    y = c(centroid_d6[2], centroid_d10[2],
          centroid_d17[2]),
    z = c(centroid_d6[3], centroid_d10[3],
          centroid_d17[3]),
    type   = "scatter3d", mode = "markers",
    marker = list(
      size = 8, color = "#000",
      symbol = "diamond", opacity = 1
    ),
    name = "Centroids",
    text = c("Day 6", "Day 10", "Day 17"),
    hoverinfo = "text"
  ) %>%
  # Vector 1: D6 -> D10 (early)
  add_trace(
    x = c(centroid_d6[1], centroid_d10[1]),
    y = c(centroid_d6[2], centroid_d10[2]),
    z = c(centroid_d6[3], centroid_d10[3]),
    type = "scatter3d", mode = "lines",
    line = list(
      width = 6, color = "#6366F1",
      dash = "dot"
    ),
    name = "D6 -> D10 (early)"
  ) %>%
  # Vector 2: D10 -> D17 (late)
  add_trace(
    x = c(centroid_d10[1], centroid_d17[1]),
    y = c(centroid_d10[2], centroid_d17[2]),
    z = c(centroid_d10[3], centroid_d17[3]),
    type = "scatter3d", mode = "lines",
    line = list(
      width = 6, color = "#F59E0B",
      dash = "dot"
    ),
    name = "D10 -> D17 (late)"
  ) %>%
  # Vector 3: D6 -> D17 (full, selected)
  add_trace(
    x = c(centroid_d6[1], centroid_d17[1]),
    y = c(centroid_d6[2], centroid_d17[2]),
    z = c(centroid_d6[3], centroid_d17[3]),
    type = "scatter3d", mode = "lines",
    line = list(width = 8, color = "#059669"),
    name = "D6 -> D17 (full)"
  ) %>%
  layout(scene = scene_axes)
```

The **full trajectory** vector (Day 6 to Day 17) is
used here because it captures the complete
differentiation arc.

### All Samples in Reference PC Space

All 18 samples projected into the D21-defined PC space.
Color indicates timepoint; shape indicates genotype.

```{r}
#| label: fig-all-pca
#| fig-cap: >
#|   All D21 and T21 samples projected into the D21
#|   control-defined PC space. Color = timepoint,
#|   shape = genotype.

geno_symbols <- c(
  "D21" = "circle", "T21" = "diamond"
)

plot_ly(
  pca_df,
  x = ~PC1, y = ~PC2, z = ~PC3,
  color  = ~timepoint,
  symbol = ~genotype,
  colors = tp_colors,
  symbols = geno_symbols,
  type   = "scatter3d",
  mode   = "markers",
  marker = list(size = 4.5, opacity = 1),
  text   = ~paste(sample, genotype, timepoint),
  hoverinfo = "text"
) %>%
  layout(scene = scene_axes)
```

### Reference Trajectory with Centroid Vector

```{r}
#| label: fig-ref-trajectory
#| fig-cap: >
#|   Reference trajectory defined by D21 Day 6 to
#|   Day 17 centroid vector (green). All samples shown
#|   with genotype shapes. Centroids marked as black
#|   diamonds.

ref_vec <- centroid_d17 - centroid_d6

plot_ly() %>%
  add_trace(
    data = pca_df,
    x = ~PC1, y = ~PC2, z = ~PC3,
    color  = ~timepoint,
    symbol = ~genotype,
    colors = tp_colors,
    symbols = geno_symbols,
    type   = "scatter3d", mode = "markers",
    marker = list(size = 4.5, opacity = 1),
    text   = ~paste(sample, genotype, timepoint),
    hoverinfo = "text"
  ) %>%
  # Centroids
  add_trace(
    x = c(centroid_d6[1], centroid_d17[1]),
    y = c(centroid_d6[2], centroid_d17[2]),
    z = c(centroid_d6[3], centroid_d17[3]),
    type   = "scatter3d", mode = "markers",
    marker = list(
      size = 8, color = "#000",
      symbol = "diamond", opacity = 1
    ),
    name = "D21 Centroids",
    text = c("Day 6 Centroid", "Day 17 Centroid"),
    hoverinfo = "text"
  ) %>%
  # Reference vector
  add_trace(
    x = c(centroid_d6[1], centroid_d17[1]),
    y = c(centroid_d6[2], centroid_d17[2]),
    z = c(centroid_d6[3], centroid_d17[3]),
    type = "scatter3d", mode = "lines",
    line = list(width = 8, color = "#059669"),
    name = "Reference Vector",
    showlegend = TRUE
  ) %>%
  # Arrow tip
  add_trace(
    type = "cone",
    x = centroid_d17[1],
    y = centroid_d17[2],
    z = centroid_d17[3],
    u = ref_vec[1] * 0.15,
    v = ref_vec[2] * 0.15,
    w = ref_vec[3] * 0.15,
    sizemode  = "absolute",
    sizeref   = 3,
    anchor    = "tail",
    showscale = FALSE,
    colorscale = list(
      c(0, "#059669"), c(1, "#059669")
    ),
    name = "", showlegend = FALSE
  ) %>%
  layout(scene = scene_axes)
```

### Sample Projections onto Trajectory

Each sample is projected onto $\vec{v}$ and
normalized:

$$
s_i
= \frac{
    \left(\mathbf{z}_i
      - \bar{\mathbf{z}}_{\text{Day}\,6}\right)
    \cdot \vec{v}
  }{
    \lVert\vec{v}\rVert^2
  }
$$

```{r}
#| label: scores-compute

scores <- apply(all_proj[, 1:3], 1, function(z) {
  sum((z - centroid_d6) * ref_vec) / sum(ref_vec^2)
})

score_df <- data.frame(
  sample    = meta$sample_id,
  genotype  = meta$genotype,
  timepoint = paste0("Day ", meta$timepoint),
  score     = scores
)
score_df$timepoint <- factor(
  score_df$timepoint,
  levels = c("Day 6", "Day 10", "Day 17")
)
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-projection-strip
#| fig-cap: >
#|   Sample positions along the D21 reference
#|   trajectory. Each point is one sample projected
#|   onto the centroid vector. Score 0 = Day 6
#|   centroid, score 1 = Day 17 centroid.
#| fig-height: 3.5
#| fig-width: 7

ggplot(
  score_df,
  aes(x = score, y = genotype,
      color = genotype, shape = genotype)
) +
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = c(0, 1),
    linetype = "dashed", color = "#000",
    alpha = 0.3
  ) +
  geom_point(size = 2.25, alpha = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ timepoint, ncol = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "D21" = "#3B82F6", "T21" = "#EF4444"
  )) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(
    "D21" = 16, "T21" = 18
  )) +
  annotate(
    "text", x = 0, y = 0.4,
    label = "Day 6\ncentroid", size = 2.5,
    hjust = 0.5, color = "#000"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text", x = 1, y = 0.4,
    label = "Day 17\ncentroid", size = 2.5,
    hjust = 0.5, color = "#000"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Maturation Score",
    y = NULL, color = "Genotype",
    shape = "Genotype"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(
      size = 10, face = "bold"
    ),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
```

### Maturation Score Comparison

```{r}
#| label: score-table

score_summary <- score_df %>%
  group_by(genotype, timepoint) %>%
  summarize(
    mean_score = round(mean(score), 3),
    sd         = round(sd(score), 3),
    .groups    = "drop"
  )

knitr::kable(
  score_summary,
  col.names = c(
    "Genotype", "Timepoint", "Mean Score", "SD"
  ),
  caption = "Maturation scores by condition"
)
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-scores
#| fig-cap: >
#|   Maturation score by genotype and timepoint.
#|   Dashed lines at 0 (Day 6 control centroid)
#|   and 1 (Day 17 control centroid).
#| fig-height: 5
#| fig-width: 6

ggplot(
  score_df,
  aes(x = timepoint, y = score, fill = genotype)
) +
  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.5, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 1
  ) +
  geom_point(
    position = position_jitterdodge(
      jitter.width = 0.05, dodge.width = 0.5
    ),
    size = 1.9, alpha = 1,
    aes(color = genotype)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "D21" = "#93C5FD", "T21" = "#FCA5A5"
  )) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "D21" = "#2563EB", "T21" = "#DC2626"
  )) +
  geom_hline(
    yintercept = c(0, 1),
    linetype = "dashed", color = "#000",
    alpha = 0.3
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text", x = 0.55, y = 0.03,
    label = "Day 6 ref", color = "#000",
    size = 3, hjust = 0
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text", x = 0.55, y = 1.03,
    label = "Day 17 ref", color = "#000",
    size = 3, hjust = 0
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL, y = "Maturation Score",
    fill = "Genotype", color = "Genotype"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
```

### Genotype Comparison

```{r}
#| label: comparison

d21_means <- score_summary %>%
  filter(genotype == "D21") %>%
  select(timepoint, d21 = mean_score)
t21_means <- score_summary %>%
  filter(genotype == "T21") %>%
  select(timepoint, t21 = mean_score)

diff_df <- inner_join(
  d21_means, t21_means, by = "timepoint"
) %>%
  mutate(
    difference = round(t21 - d21, 3),
    pct_diff   = paste0(
      round(difference * 100, 1), "%"
    )
  )

knitr::kable(
  diff_df,
  col.names = c(
    "Timepoint", "D21 Score", "T21 Score",
    "Difference", "% Difference"
  ),
  caption = "Maturation score differences (T21 - D21)"
)
```

---

*Data: Martinez et al. (2024).
Front Cell Neurosci 18: 1341141.*
